description: Fill a PDF's AcroForm fields from a values JSON (each entry: field_id, page, value) and write a new PDF with NeedAppearances set. Validates field ids, page numbers, and checkbox/radio/choice values before writing. Wraps pypdf.
rules: reads the input PDF + a values JSON; writes a new filled PDF (input untouched)
rejects unknown field ids, wrong page numbers, and invalid checkbox/radio/choice values
filled PDF is written to record_store/filled.pdf; a manifest line goes to fill_fillable.txt
needs pypdf at runtime; absent -> manifest note + exit 0
usage: Set PDF_PATH (input .pdf) and FIELDS_JSON (array of {field_id, page, value}). Outputs: filled.pdf + fill_fillable.txt. Use extract-fields first to learn the field ids.
limitation: Only works on PDFs that already have an AcroForm (use fill-annotations for non-fillable PDFs). Requires pypdf.
